name: Phase1 public project status
public_state: active edge development with published wiki, clean public link surface, and reviewed B3 VM evidence present
important_boundary: Percentages are planning estimates, not production-readiness or security-hardening claims. Reviewed B3 VM evidence is present, but installer, recovery-complete, hardening, release-candidate, and daily-driver readiness remain not claimed.

projects.name: Phase1 operator console
projects.state: usable edge console with guarded host access, VFS, dashboards, help UI, themes, learning, and tests
projects.next_milestone: polish release-facing flows and keep safe defaults simple

projects.name: Fyr native language
projects.state: seed language and toolchain surface exist with scripts, tests, assertions, package checks, and docs
projects.next_milestone: expand language book, package workflow, and runtime integration

projects.name: Base1 secure host / OS track
projects.state: B2 focused test-suite evidence passed, B3 GNU/Linux emulator evidence passed, B3 UEFI proof passed, B3 kernel/initrd handoff passed, OpenBSD launch evidence is present, and B3 log-bundle review passed; claim remains not_claimed
projects.next_milestone: begin B4 recovery validation while keeping installer, hardware, hardening, release-candidate, and daily-driver claims out of scope

projects.name: X200 / Libreboot hardware path
projects.state: X200 Linux-libre host generated reviewed B3 VM evidence across GNU/Linux staging, UEFI proof, kernel/initrd handoff, and OpenBSD launch evidence; physical boot evidence remains separate and not claimed
projects.next_milestone: capture repeatable physical boot evidence and keep emulator, USB, recovery, and hardware claims separated

projects.name: Security and crypto policy
projects.state: trust model, crypto policy roadmap, provider registry, profile docs, config schema, and integrity checks are present
projects.next_milestone: move from documentation policy into scoped implementation only after tests and review evidence

projects.name: Website and public docs
projects.state: public site, status page, status JSON, badge endpoint, native GitHub Wiki, refreshed source wiki, organized docs, asset policy, Pages routing, clean public link checks, X200 evidence report, and reviewed B3 VM evidence wording are in place
projects.next_milestone: publish B4 recovery validation status and keep public claims evidence-bound

projects.name: Repository organization
projects.state: minimal root has 12 tracked files, 16 top-level folders, 0 unplanned root files, 0 tracked build files, 0 root status duplicates, and clean Base1 link-check output
projects.next_milestone: keep generated artifacts out of Git and keep compatibility links clean as work lands

non_claims: X200 hardware marker evidence is present with phase1_marker_seen; non-claims remain in force
